title: Photorealistic Text-to-Image Diffusion Models with Deep Language Understanding
hook: Watch a text prompt turn into a jaw-dropping photorealistic image, powered by language understanding.
promise: You will understand how Imagen uses language models to create stunning images from text prompts.
prerequisite_note: Bring an open mind about how AI can turn words into pictures using step-by-step noise removal.

glossary.plain: A process that starts with noise and gradually turns it into a detailed image.
A neural network that transforms words into a format a computer can use.
Images that look convincingly like real photographs.
A powerful language model used to deeply understand text prompts.
A model that predicts how to reduce noise in an image at each step.
The way the model steers image generation to match the text.

cards.title: From Words to Hyperreal Images
body: Learn how Imagen turns text prompts into photorealistic images using advanced language understanding.

cards.title: How can AI draw what you describe?
body: Imagine typing a sentence and instantly seeing a detailed photo that matches it. This is not magic, but the result of powerful AI models.
Imagen’s breakthrough is letting computers really understand your words, then guiding a step-by-step image creation process to match them with stunning realism.

cards.title: How Imagen turns text into images
body: First, Imagen reads your prompt and deeply understands it with a language model. Next, it uses this understanding to steer the image creation process.
The model starts with random noise and, guided by the text features, gradually refines the image, removing noise step by step until a detailed picture emerges.
cards.caption: Imagen’s core is strong language guidance for stepwise image generation.

cards.title: How does strong language understanding change image generation?
body: Compare generating images with a basic versus a powerful text encoder.
cards.offNote: Images may look generic or miss details from the prompt.
cards.onNote: Images closely match the prompt with sharper details and realism.

cards.title: Let language models drive the image process
body: Previous models used simple text encodings, which often missed subtle meanings or details in prompts.
Imagen’s trick is to use a benchmark-leading language model, T5, to extract rich meaning from text and guide every step of the diffusion process.

cards.title: How much should the model trust the text?
body: Adjust the slider to see how strict guidance affects the final image.
cards.low: Image may ignore prompt details and look random.
cards.mid: Some prompt details appear, but image may be blurry or generic.
cards.high: Image closely matches prompt with sharp, realistic details.

cards.title: What does Imagen need to succeed?
body: Select the key ingredients that make Imagen’s results possible.

choices.label: Score-based diffusion model
choices.note: Turns noise into images step by step.

choices.label: Guidance mechanism
choices.note: Steers image generation using text features.

choices.label: Large and diverse training data
choices.note: Helps model generalize to many prompts.

choices.label: Careful prompt engineering
choices.note: Ensures prompts are clear and effective.

cards.title: Imagen sets a new bar for text-to-image
body: Imagen outperformed other models in both photorealism and how well images matched the text.
Human raters preferred Imagen’s images, especially for creative or unusual prompts, showing the power of strong language guidance.
cards.caption: Imagen led in realism and accuracy, changing expectations for text-to-image AI.

cards.title: Why Imagen became a landmark paper
body: Imagen proved that using a powerful language model makes a huge difference in generating images from text.
Its approach inspired a new wave of research and raised the bar for what people expect from AI-generated art.

recap.label: Read
recap.note: Understand the text prompt with a strong language model.

recap.label: Guide
recap.note: Use text features to steer the diffusion process.

recap.label: Refine
recap.note: Remove noise step by step to reveal the image.

recap.label: Deliver
recap.note: Produce a photorealistic image that matches the prompt.

cards.title: Photorealistic Text-to-Image Diffusion Models with Deep Language Understanding
body: Read the full paper to see details, results, and sample images from the Imagen model.
